ksa_text: Knowledge of simulation and scenario analysis methods, including simulation testing tools, scenario modeling techniques, what-if analysis approaches, and the use of simulation to predict and measure outcomes under uncertainty.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Edge-domain Applied Analytics & BI KSA with insufficient signal strength (composite score 0.0) to justify inclusion for the Director of AI/ML. Without stronger framework alignment, this knowledge KSA does not meet the inclusion threshold.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope, seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with exclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Could this edge-domain knowledge KSA be expected in real-world Director of AI/ML roles, even if not core to the role definition?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Job market analysis and framework role definitions confirm Applied Analytics & BI is not a standard competency expectation for Director of AI/ML. Edge-case exclusion is consistent with external evidence.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: external evidence does not support including this edge-domain KSA in the Director of AI/ML competency profile. Exclusion maintained.

decision_rationale: Insufficient signal (score 0.0) and edge-domain placement (Applied Analytics & BI) do not meet inclusion threshold for the Director of AI/ML. All passes support exclusion.
